summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of 5 UI bug fixes for Abdul Azis portfolio. All 5 fixes verified and working correctly. All regression tests passed.
passed_tests: FIX 1: No top-header element exists in hero state or after scroll (data-testid='top-header' not found)
FIX 2: Project Detail button removed (data-testid='project-card-detail-button' not found), project title clickable (data-testid='project-card-title-button' opens modal)
FIX 2: Project detail modal opens with screenshots, Live Demo and Go to Website buttons, and closes successfully
FIX 3: Sidebar identity section uses vertical centered layout (flex-direction: column, align-items: center)
FIX 3: Sidebar identity shows photo centered, name 'Abdul Azis' below, title 'Full Stack Developer' below
FIX 4: Section spacing reduced to 60px top padding (verified on projects section)
FIX 5: Theme toggle (data-testid='theme-toggle-button') visible in hero state at top-right position (x=1856)
FIX 5: Theme toggle still visible after scrolling past hero
FIX 5: Theme toggle switches between dark/light mode and persists in localStorage
REGRESSION: All sidebar nav links exist and are clickable (home, projects, experience, tech-stack, education, contact)
REGRESSION: Contact section visible with working form validation (shows errors for empty fields)

success_percentage.backend: N/A (backend not tested, frontend-only testing requested)
